STEP2: PowerPoint found
STEP3: Getting selection
STEP4: Selection type: 2
STEP5: Getting shape
STEP6: Shape name: Right Arrow 3
STEP7: Building data
STEP8: Converting to JSON
STEP8a: Saving native PPTX for accurate color preservation
STEP9: Outputting JSON
{"name":"Right Arrow 3","type":39,"autoShapeName":"msoShapeRightArrow","left":2.0,"top":3.0,"width":2.5,"height":0.75,"rotation":0,"adjustments":[0.5,0.5],"nativePptxRelPath":"native/shape_captured_1700000000002.pptx","fillColor":"#ED7D31","lineColor":"#B45D20","lineWeight":1}
STEP10: Done
